seoTitle: CXMT Memory Solutions | Data Center & Mobile | LiTong Distributor
seoDescription: Explore CXMT memory solutions for data centers, AI/ML, and mobile devices. Complete designs with BOM and technical specifications.

faqs.question: What memory solutions does CXMT offer?
faqs.answer: CXMT provides comprehensive DRAM memory solutions including: (1) Data Center Solutions - high-capacity DDR5 RDIMM/MRDIMM for cloud computing and enterprise servers; (2) AI/ML Solutions - high-bandwidth memory configurations for AI training and inference; (3) Mobile Solutions - LPDDR5X for flagship smartphones and tablets; (4) PC/Workstation Solutions - DDR5 UDIMM/SODIMM for desktops and laptops; (5) Embedded Solutions - industrial-grade memory for IoT and edge devices. Each solution includes memory selection guidance, platform compatibility verification, and technical support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select a solution based on your application type, performance requirements, and platform compatibility.

faqs.question: How do I design a DDR5 memory subsystem using CXMT products?
faqs.answer: Designing a DDR5 subsystem with CXMT memory involves: (1) Platform selection - verify CPU/memory controller supports target DDR5 speed; (2) Memory configuration - determine capacity, rank, and module type based on requirements; (3) PCB design - follow platform vendor layout guidelines for DDR5 signal routing; (4) Power design - ensure clean 1.1V power supply with adequate current capacity; (5) Thermal design - provide adequate cooling for high-speed operation; (6) Validation - test memory subsystem thoroughly across voltage and temperature; (7) Compliance - verify JEDEC compliance and platform compatibility. CXMT provides reference designs and technical support for DDR5 implementation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with platform vendor reference design. Contact CXMT technical team for memory-specific guidance.

faqs.question: What support does LiTong provide for CXMT solution implementation?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive support for CXMT solution implementation: (1) Memory selection - technical team helps choose right CXMT product for your application; (2) Compatibility verification - verify CXMT memory with your target platform; (3) Design review - schematic and PCB layout review for memory implementation; (4) Signal integrity - guidance on DDR5/LPDDR5X signal integrity and layout; (5) Validation support - assistance with memory testing and validation; (6) Reference designs - access to proven memory implementations; (7) Troubleshooting - debug support for memory-related issues. Our technical team has extensive DRAM experience and can help ensure successful memory integration.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our technical team early in your design cycle for memory selection and throughout development for optimization support.

solutions.title: AI Inference Memory Solution
solutions.subtitle: High-bandwidth memory solution for AI/ML inference acceleration
solutions.description: Complete memory solution for AI inference applications featuring CXMT high-speed DDR5 and LPDDR5X products optimized for neural network processing.
solutions.longDescription:
The AI Inference Memory Solution from CXMT provides the high-bandwidth, low-latency memory required for modern AI/ML inference workloads. This solution combines CXMT's fastest DDR5 and LPDDR5X products to deliver exceptional performance for edge AI devices, inference servers, and AI accelerators.

Key features include support for batch inference optimization, model parallelism, and efficient data movement. The solution addresses the memory bottleneck that often limits AI performance, enabling faster inference times and higher throughput.

With speeds up to 8000Mbps for DDR5 and 10667Mbps for LPDDR5X, this solution provides the bandwidth needed for large neural network models. The high density options (up to 24Gb) support large model parameters and batch sizes.

benefits.title: High Bandwidth
benefits.description: Up to 8000Mbps DDR5 and 10667Mbps LPDDR5X for fast data access

benefits.title: Low Latency
benefits.description: Optimized for AI inference workloads with minimal access delays

benefits.title: High Density
benefits.description: Up to 24Gb density supports large neural network models

benefits.title: Power Efficient
benefits.description: Advanced power management for sustained AI workloads

customerCases.challenge: Needed high-bandwidth memory for AI inference accelerator
customerCases.feedback: The memory bandwidth was critical for our AI accelerator performance.
customerCases.result: Successfully deployed in production AI systems

faeInsights.content: For AI inference applications, memory bandwidth is often the bottleneck. This solution addresses that with high-speed DDR5 and LPDDR5X. Key considerations include memory channel optimization, thermal management for sustained workloads, and proper initialization for AI-specific access patterns.
keyTakeaways: Memory bandwidth critical for AI performance
Thermal design important for sustained workloads

faqs.question: What makes this solution suitable for AI inference?
faqs.answer: High bandwidth (8000Mbps DDR5, 10667Mbps LPDDR5X), low latency, and high density (24Gb) support the demanding memory requirements of neural network inference.

solutions.title: 5G Infrastructure Memory Solution
solutions.subtitle: Reliable memory solution for 5G base stations and network equipment
solutions.description: High-reliability memory solution for 5G infrastructure featuring CXMT DDR5 RDIMM and ECC UDIMM products with extended temperature support.
solutions.longDescription:
The 5G Infrastructure Memory Solution from CXMT provides the reliability and performance required for 5G base stations, small cells, and network equipment. This solution features industrial-grade DDR5 products with ECC support and extended temperature operation.

With 5G networks requiring 24/7 operation in harsh environments, memory reliability is critical. This solution addresses that with rigorous testing, ECC error correction, and industrial temperature grade components.

The solution supports the high data throughput of 5G networks while maintaining signal integrity and reliability in challenging deployment conditions.

benefits.title: High Reliability
benefits.description: ECC support and rigorous testing ensure 24/7 operation

benefits.title: Industrial Grade
benefits.description: Extended temperature range for harsh environments

customerCases.challenge: Needed reliable memory for outdoor 5G small cells
customerCases.feedback: The industrial temperature grade was essential for our outdoor deployments.
customerCases.result: Deployed in thousands of 5G small cells nationwide

faeInsights.content: 5G infrastructure demands the highest reliability. This solution meets that with ECC, industrial temperature grades, and extensive validation. Key design considerations include thermal management, signal integrity, and proper ECC implementation.
keyTakeaways: Signal integrity critical at high speeds

faqs.question: Why is ECC important for 5G infrastructure?
faqs.answer: ECC detects and corrects memory errors, preventing system crashes in 24/7 deployed equipment. Critical for maintaining network availability.

bomList.description: ECC DDR5 RDIMM for base stations
ECC DDR5 UDIMM for small cells
